Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Snapshot

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Snapshot
public class Snapshot extends Object
Snapshot - A snapshot of the data at a specific point in time. This contains the snapshot details and the download_uri of the file containing the snapshot data.

    • createTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> createTime()
      The timestamp at which the snapshot was created at in UTC.

    • file

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<File> file()
      The details of file containing the snapshot data. This contains the download uri and uri expiry time.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The name of the resource.

    • processDate

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<SnapshotProcessDate> processDate()
      The process date of the snapshot. This date corresponds to the underlying data within the snapshot.

    • snapshotId

      public Optional<String> snapshotId()
      The unique identifier of the snapshot file.

      The type of the snapshot.
